name: foundry-vox-mlx-baseline
benchmark_texts: Hello, this is a speed test.
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the riverbank.
In the beginning, there was nothing but silence. Then came the voice, clear and resonant, filling every corner of the room with warmth and presence.
notes: This baseline protects the current stable MLX configuration and standalone performance envelope.
If you intentionally improve the model stack, update this file in the same change as the engine/config changes and re-run the benchmark audit.
